# GitHub Copilot — repository context (UltraStats)

- Project overview, layout, and how to run locally: [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) and [README.md](../README.md).
- Security expectations: [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md).
- **Agent skills** in [`.agent/`](../.agent/README.md) — for **SUMMARIZE** / **squashed commit** / PR handoff use [`.agent/skills/summarize-handoff.md`](../.agent/skills/summarize-handoff.md) (run `git status -sb` and `git diff --stat` from the repo root first).
